    Variable TodoServiceConst

    TodoService: {
        addTodoEntry(
            data: { description: string | null; name: string; todoListID: string },
        ): Promise<TodoEntryDTO>;
        addTodoList(
            data: { name: string; workspaceID: string | null },
        ): Promise<TodoListDTO>;
        deleteTodoEntry(todoEntryID: string): Promise<any>;
        deleteTodoList(todoListID: string): Promise<any>;
        getAllTodoEntriesOfUser(): Promise<any>;
        getAllTodoEntriesOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>;
        getAllTodoListsOfUser(): Promise<any>;
        getAllTodoListsOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>;
        getSpaceInfosOfTodoEntry(todoEntryID: string): Promise<WorkspaceDTO>;
        getTodoListCountOfUser(): Promise<number>;
        getTodoListCountOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<number>;
        getTodoListWithID(todoListID: string): Promise<TodoListDTO>;
        saveTodoEntry(
            data: {
                description?: string;
                id: string;
                name?: string;
                status?: number;
            },
        ): Promise<TodoEntryDTO>;
        saveTodoList(
            data: {
                id: string;
                isArchived?: boolean;
                name?: string;
                status?: number;
            },
        ): Promise<TodoListDTO>;
    } = ...

    Client for the todo endpoints: todo lists and their entries, plus queries. Methods throw on a non-OK response.

    Type Declaration

    • addTodoEntry: function
      • addTodoEntry(
            data: { description: string | null; name: string; todoListID: string },
        ): Promise<TodoEntryDTO>

        Adds an entry to a todo list.

        Parameters

        • data: { description: string | null; name: string; todoListID: string }

          Entry name, parent list ID and optional description.

        Returns Promise<TodoEntryDTO>

        The created entry.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:53
    • addTodoList: function
      • addTodoList(
            data: { name: string; workspaceID: string | null },
        ): Promise<TodoListDTO>

        Creates a new todo list, optionally inside a workspace.

        Parameters

        • data: { name: string; workspaceID: string | null }

          List name and optional workspace.

        Returns Promise<TodoListDTO>

        The created list.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:21

          The entry to delete.

        Returns Promise<any>

    • getAllTodoEntriesOfUser: function
      • getAllTodoEntriesOfUser(): Promise<any>

        Returns all entries of the current user's personal todo lists.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of entries.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:249
    • getAllTodoEntriesOfWorkspace: function
      • getAllTodoEntriesOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns all entries of all todo lists in a workspace.

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace whose entries are requested.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of entries.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:266

      • getAllTodoListsOfUser(): Promise<any>

        Returns all of the current user's personal todo lists.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of todo lists.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:195
    • getAllTodoListsOfWorkspace: function

        Returns all todo lists of a workspace.

          The workspace whose lists are requested.

      • getSpaceInfosOfTodoEntry(todoEntryID: string): Promise<WorkspaceDTO>

        Returns the workspace a todo entry belongs to.

        • todoEntryID: string

          The entry whose workspace is requested.

        Returns Promise<WorkspaceDTO>

        The workspace.

      • getTodoListCountOfUser(): Promise<number>

        The list count.

    • getTodoListCountOfWorkspace: function
      • getTodoListCountOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<number>

        Returns the number of todo lists in a workspace.

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace to count lists for.

        Returns Promise<number>

        The list count.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:300
    • getTodoListWithID: function
      • getTodoListWithID(todoListID: string): Promise<TodoListDTO>

        Returns a single todo list by its ID.

        Parameters

        • todoListID: string

          The list to look up.

        Returns Promise<TodoListDTO>

        The todo list.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:231
    • saveTodoEntry: function
      • saveTodoEntry(
            data: {
                description?: string;
                id: string;
                name?: string;
                status?: number;
            },
        ): Promise<TodoEntryDTO>

        Updates a todo entry (only provided fields change). Toggling the status may flip the parent list's status.

        Parameters

        • data: { description?: string; id: string; name?: string; status?: number }

          The entry ID plus the fields to change (name, description, status).

        Returns Promise<TodoEntryDTO>

        The updated entry.

        • Defined in services/api/todoService.ts:122
    • saveTodoList: function
      • saveTodoList(
            data: {
                id: string;
                isArchived?: boolean;
                name?: string;
                status?: number;
            },
        ): Promise<TodoListDTO>

        Updates a todo list (only provided fields change).

        Parameters

        • data: { id: string; isArchived?: boolean; name?: string; status?: number }

          The list ID plus the fields to change (name, status, archived).

        Returns Promise<TodoListDTO>

        The updated list.
